name: accordion-item-single
description: An accordion item single component renders collapsible content in a group to support single expansion, when only one of the items in the group can be expanded at a time.

itemKey.description: Specifies the item key of each AccordionItemSingle.

disabled.description: Disables the collapsible if set to true.

iconPosition.description: Changes chevron icon placement at the end of the collapsible header.

header.description: Collapsible's header. If not specified, the header contains only an open/close icon. The header text is required for accessibility purposes.

slots.description: Collapsible's content node. Place any content to be shown/hidden inside this property.

ojCollapse.description: Triggered after the item has been collapsed (after animation completes).

ojExpand.description: Triggered after the item has been expanded (after animation completes).

setProperty.description: Sets a property or a single subproperty for complex properties and notifies the component of the change, triggering a corresponding event.

params.name: property
params.description: The property name to set. Supports dot notation for subproperty access.

params.name: value
params.description: The new value to set the property to.

getProperty.description: Retrieves the value of a property or a subproperty.

params.name: property
params.description: The property name to get. Supports dot notation for subproperty access.

setProperties.description: Performs a batch set of properties.

params.name: properties
params.description: An object containing the property and value pairs to set.
